title: Enigma Stage 5 Frontier Postmortem — Singles Rerun, Composition Learning, and Corrected Frontier Carry
objective: Correct the Stage 5 process by running a singles-first 20k batch, then use those results to probe composition, and finally run a corrected second act that explicitly carries the previous frontier composite into the new composition family.

infrastructure.optimizer: Production MuonAdamW with production schedules active and feature-specific monkey patches

process_correction.what_was_wrong_before: The earlier Stage 5 production loop mixed new singles and composites in one batch. That made attribution weak and skipped the intended population-first structure.
what_was_done_now: Run a fresh singles-first 20k batch with 8 new single ideas, production baseline, prior single winner, and the accidental prior composite winner as a sentinel.
Run an internal composition batch to see which new-family components actually compound.
Run a corrected frontier batch that explicitly carries the previous frontier composite H64_H60_H73 into the new composition family.
process_correction.important_note: Cross-batch absolute BPB comparisons still show baseline drift, so the strongest conclusions are within-batch, then across batches only with caution.

batch_1_singles_rerun_2026.headline: The real new winners were H538, H533, and H532. H535 was flat solo but stayed alive as a possible helper. The carried previous frontier family was not strong in this rerun.

batch_2_internal_composites_2037.headline: The strongest new-family composition was H533+H535. Bigger stacks mostly failed. This was the first clear sign that H535 mattered conditionally and that H538 was not reliably additive.

batch_3_corrected_frontier_2050.headline: The corrected second act says the best frontier-aware composition is H60+H73+H533+H535. It beats the carried H64_H60_H73 parent in-batch, but only by a small margin.

leave_one_out_set.interpretation: H64 is harmful inside the new H60/H73/H533/H535 family.
H60 still helps, but its contribution is smaller than H73/H533/H535.
H73 is strongly helpful in this family.
H533 is strongly helpful in this family.
H535 is also genuinely additive here, despite being weak or flat alone.

corrected_loo_attribution.bottom_line: The new best family is H60+H73+H533+H535. H64 does not belong in that stack.

R1_h535_is_a_real_conditional_helper.observation: H535 was only +0.000055 vs baseline as a single in the singles rerun, but H533+H535 became the best result of the internal composite batch at 1.399430 and removing H535 from the corrected full stack made the result much worse (1.424255).
R1_h535_is_a_real_conditional_helper.mechanistic_explanation: H535 is not a strong standalone improvement. Its value appears when H533 has already changed the Muon path, suggesting that the embedding/value-embed epsilon schedule helps the AdamW path track or regularize a Muon-side change rather than helping independently.

R2_h64_and_h533_do_not_add_cleanly.observation: The corrected full stack with H64 scored 1.416359, while removing H64 improved it to 1.405599.
R2_h64_and_h533_do_not_add_cleanly.mechanistic_explanation: H64 was useful in the old frontier family, but once H533+H535 are present, the old H64 effect appears to over-shape the Muon path. The new family wants H60 and H73 preserved, but not H64.

R3_h538_is_not_robust_yet.observation: H538 won the singles rerun at 1.424759, but lost badly in the corrected frontier batch as a single (1.438727) and also failed to improve the carried frontier parent (H64_H60_H73_H538 = 1.426536).
R3_h538_is_not_robust_yet.mechanistic_explanation: H538 is either unstable across batches or highly context-dependent. Seeding embedding second moments from the first gradient may help in some runs, but it is not a robust frontier component yet.

R4_the_new_best_corrected_run_is_small_m.observation: H60_H73_H533_H535 beats H64_H60_H73 by only +0.002104 in the corrected batch. Late train_bpb at 19.5k is actually slightly worse for the new best run (6.6605) than for the carried parent (6.6032).
R4_the_new_best_corrected_run_is_small_m.mechanistic_explanation: The gain is real within the batch, but it does not look like a large optimization-quality jump. It is more consistent with a small validation-side or regularization-side improvement than a dramatic train-loss improvement.

R5_h60_h73_remains_the_stable_core.observation: The best corrected run keeps H60 and H73. Removing H60 hurts modestly; removing H73 hurts strongly.
R5_h60_h73_remains_the_stable_core.mechanistic_explanation: The old H60/H73 backbone still looks structurally correct. The new value added in Stage 5 is the H533/H535 family, not a replacement of H60/H73.

R6_cross_batch_absolute_bpbs_still_shift.observation: The internal composite batch baseline was 1.433856, while the corrected frontier batch baseline was 1.423974. The earlier mixed Stage 5 production batch baseline was 1.425995.
R6_cross_batch_absolute_bpbs_still_shift.mechanistic_explanation: This is too much movement to ignore. It means cross-batch raw BPBs are informative but not decisive by themselves. Strongest conclusions should be made from within-batch deltas and repeated structures.

NK28.finding: Do not evaluate a new composition family without carrying the previous frontier parent
NK28.evidence: The internal composite batch found H533_H535 = 1.399430, but it did not answer whether the new family beat the previous frontier until the corrected batch was run.
NK28.do_not_repeat: Every second-act composition batch must include the previous frontier comparator directly.

NK29.finding: H538 should not be promoted yet
NK29.evidence: It won one singles rerun, but lost in the corrected frontier batch both alone and as a frontier extension.
NK29.do_not_repeat: Do not treat H538 as a stable frontier component until it reproduces in another singles-first batch.

NK30.finding: Large stacks are still unreliable by default
NK30.evidence: The internal 4-way stack H532_H533_H535_H538 lost badly, and the corrected full stack with H64 also underperformed its H64-removed LOO.
NK30.do_not_repeat: Assume additivity is false until LOO proves otherwise.

meta_lessons.lesson: A weak single can still be a strong compositional helper
meta_lessons.evidence: H535 was flat solo but materially improved both H533_H535 and the corrected frontier family.

meta_lessons.lesson: The previous frontier must be part of the second act, not just a historical note
meta_lessons.evidence: Without the corrected frontier batch, the internal composite batch would have overstated how complete the new-family picture was.

meta_lessons.lesson: LOO should be done on one chosen full composite, not on arbitrary permutations
meta_lessons.evidence: The corrected batch cleanly identified H64 as harmful and H73/H533/H535 as helpful by using one full stack and its exact one-component removals.

meta_lessons.lesson: Within-batch deltas are more trustworthy than raw cross-batch BPBs when baseline drift exists
meta_lessons.evidence: The same families moved materially across the singles rerun, internal composite batch, and corrected frontier batch.

paths_promising.path: Promote H60+H73+H533+H535 as the new compositional family to replicate
paths_promising.reason: It was the best run in the corrected frontier batch and its LOO structure is coherent.

paths_promising.path: Replicate H533_H535 and H60+H73+H533+H535 in the same batch
paths_promising.reason: H533_H535 had the strongest raw new-family result, while H60+H73+H533+H535 beat the carried frontier parent. These need same-batch confirmation.

paths_promising.path: Demote H64 within the new H533/H535 family
paths_promising.reason: The corrected LOO says H64 hurts that stack.

paths_promising.path: Retest H538 only after a cleaner reproduction pass
paths_promising.reason: Its behavior is inconsistent across batches.

paths_promising.path: Investigate why H535 becomes powerful only in composition
paths_promising.reason: This is the most interesting new mechanistic clue from Stage 5.

current_best_within_corrected_frontier_b.title: H60 + H73 + H533 + H535
current_best_within_corrected_frontier_b.reason: Best corrected frontier-aware run and beats the carried H64_H60_H73 parent in-batch

current_best_raw_new_family_result.title: H533 + H535
current_best_raw_new_family_result.reason: Best raw score found in the internal new-family composite batch

do_not_promote_yet: Any stack that keeps H64 inside the H533/H535 family by default
